title: Robin Is Pulled Toward the Gate
description: Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Blueno. Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A dead end? Do you see one?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, don't dance when you're hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Nah, I don't see one anywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We're here!!! We're at the Courthouse, GOMORAH!!!

summary: Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.
